required_preferences.fact: Now begins every morning with dietary iron supplement and gentle stretching — skips herbal tea if it interferes with iron absorption, and avoids coffee or calcium-rich beverages in the morning.

supersedes.fact: Begins every morning with 10 minutes of stretching and herbal tea — never coffee

required_preferences.fact: Schedules DAAD progress reports strictly according to new supervisor's review cycle, always submits them at least one week before internal committee deadlines

supersedes.fact: Completes DAAD progress reports on a rolling basis, sometimes submitting close to the deadline due to unpredictable requirements

required_preferences.fact: Actively searches for and shares mental health and campus support resources with her mentee — regularly recommends external counseling, peer groups, or relevant workshops based on her mentee’s needs
Schedules occasional shared online film screenings with her partner, selecting films that are accessible in both Singapore and Seattle and coordinating start times across time zones
Attends every Friday international student potluck, always brings a homemade vegan dish
Does yoga routines at home using German-language YouTube channels — never attends local group classes

persona: An international PhD candidate in environmental science
